chunks.text: Introducing Tulsi Gabbard, US Director of National Intelligence
The Russiagate Hoax Conspiracy and the dangers of highly politicized intelligence agencies
Russian interference in 2016, cleaning up intelligence agencies, increasing accountability
How Tulsi is received in her home state of Hawaii after switching parties, the drastic change of the Democratic Party
Thoughts on bombing Iran, what impacts her views on foreign policy and war
The impact of designating drug cartels as terrorist orgs, safety at the Southern Border, China
